description.en: Hemoglobin carries oxygen throughout the body.
description.od: ହିମୋଗ୍ଲୋବିନ ଶରୀରରେ ଅକ୍ସିଜେନ ବହନ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low hemoglobin may indicate anemia. Eat iron-rich foods.
remarks.high: High hemoglobin may indicate dehydration or carbon exposure.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Severe anemia or highly viscous blood. Immediate medical review needed.

description.en: RBCs carry oxygen in blood.
description.od: ଆର୍‌ବିସି ରକ୍ତରେ ଅକ୍ସିଜେନ ବହନ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low RBC count may indicate anemia.
remarks.high: High RBC count may indicate dehydration.

description.en: WBCs help fight infections.
description.od: ଡବ୍ଲ୍ୟୁବିସି ସଂକ୍ରମଣ ସହିତ ଲଢେ।

remarks.low: Low WBC may weaken immunity.
remarks.high: High WBC may indicate infection or inflammation.

description.en: Platelets help blood clotting and tissue healing.
description.od: ପ୍ଲେଟଲେଟ ରକ୍ତ ଜମାହେବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low platelets may increase bleeding risk. Common in viral infections.
remarks.high: High platelets may indicate inflammation or infection.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Platelets are dangerously low. High bleeding risk! Emergency care needed.

description.en: Measures sugar level in blood.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ଶର୍କରାର ମାତ୍ରା ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Low sugar (Hypoglycemia) may cause weakness or dizziness.
remarks.high: High sugar (Hyperglycemia) may indicate prediabetes or diabetes.

description.en: Shows average blood sugar over 3 months.
description.od: ୩ ମାସର ମଧ୍ୟମ ରକ୍ତ ଶର୍କରା ଦେଖାଏ।

remarks.low: Low HbA1c may indicate low average glucose levels.
remarks.normal: HbA1c is in a healthy range.
remarks.high: High HbA1c indicates prediabetes (5.7%-6.4%) or diabetes (>=6.5%).

description.en: Checks kidney waste filtration efficiency.
description.od: ବୃକ୍କର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ଷମତା ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low creatinine is usually harmless and linked to low muscle mass.
remarks.high: High creatinine indicates reduced kidney function.

description.en: Measures protein waste filtered by kidneys.
description.od: ବୃକ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଫିଲ୍ଟର ହେଉଥିବା ବର୍ଜ୍ୟ ପଦାର୍ଥ ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Low urea is rare and usually not serious.
remarks.normal: Blood urea is within the normal range.
remarks.high: High urea indicates kidney dysfunction, dehydration, or high protein intake.

description.en: Measures total cholesterol fat in blood.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ମୋଟ କୋଲେଷ୍ଟେରଲ ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Low cholesterol is generally fine.
remarks.high: High cholesterol (>=240 mg/dL) increases risk of cardiovascular disease.

description.en: Measures stored fats in blood for energy.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ଚର୍ବିର ମାତ୍ରା ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Low triglycerides are usually healthy.
remarks.high: High triglycerides raise risk of heart issues. Very High (>=500) raises pancreas risk.

description.en: HDL is 'good' cholesterol protecting the heart.
description.od: ଏଚ୍‌ଡିଏଲ୍ ଭଲ କୋଲେଷ୍ଟେରଲ ଅଟେ।

remarks.low: Low HDL increases cardiovascular risks.
remarks.normal: HDL level is healthy and protective.
remarks.high: High HDL is excellent and heart-protective.

description.en: LDL is 'bad' cholesterol causing plaque in arteries.
description.od: ଏଲ୍‌ଡିଏଲ୍ ଖରାପ କୋଲେଷ୍ଟେରଲ ଅଟେ।

remarks.low: Low LDL is healthy.
remarks.high: High LDL increases arterial blockages and heart risks.

description.en: Measures hidden inflammation caused by infection or chronic conditions.
description.od: ସଂକ୍ରମଣ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରଦାହ ଜନିତ ସ୍ଥିତି ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

remarks.low: Slow sedimentation rate, usually normal.
remarks.normal: Sedimentation rate is normal. No signs of active inflammation.
remarks.high: Elevated rate indicates active inflammation, infection, or chronic condition.

description.en: Measures how long it takes blood to clot (blood thinness test).
description.od: ରକ୍ତ ଜମାଟ ବାନ୍ଧିବା ପାଇଁ କେତେ ସମୟ ଲାଗେ ତାହା ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Blood clots too quickly, raising risk of strokes or clots.
remarks.high: Blood clots too slowly, raising bleeding risks. Caution with injuries.

description.en: Measures the percentage of red blood cells in the blood.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ଲାଲ୍ ରକ୍ତ କଣିକାର ପ୍ରତିଶତ ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Low volume indicates anemia.
remarks.high: High volume indicates dehydration or excess red cells.

description.en: Key electrolyte that regulates fluid balance, nerve and muscle function.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ସୋଡିୟମର ମାତ୍ରା ମାପେ ଯାହା ଶରୀରରେ ଜଳ ସନ୍ତୁଳନ ରଖେ।

remarks.low: Hyponatremia. Low sodium can cause fatigue and confusion.
remarks.normal: Sodium level is normal and balanced.
remarks.high: Hypernatremia. High sodium is usually due to dehydration.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Sodium level is extremely abnormal. Urgent medical review required!

description.en: Critical electrolyte for heart rhythm, nerve, and muscle cells.
description.od: ରକ୍ତରେ ପୋଟାସିୟମର ମାତ୍ରା ମାପେ, ଯାହା ହୃଦୟର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ଗୁਰୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ।

remarks.low: Hypokalemia. Low potassium can cause muscle weakness or cramping.
remarks.high: Hyperkalemia. High potassium can disrupt heart rhythm.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Potassium level is dangerous. Risk of cardiac issues. See doctor immediately!

description.en: Essential mineral for bone health, heart, muscle, and nerve function.
description.od: ହାଡ ଏବଂ ହୃଦୟର ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ କ୍ୟାଲସିୟମ୍ ମାପେ।

remarks.low: Hypocalcemia. Low calcium can affect bones and nerves.
remarks.high: Hypercalcemia. High calcium can lead to kidney stones.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Calcium level is extremely abnormal. High risk of muscle spasms or heart strain.

description.en: Pancreatic enzyme that helps digest carbohydrates.
description.od: ଅଗ୍ନ୍ୟାଶୟ ଏନଜାଇମ ଯାହା ଖାଦ୍ୟ ହଜମ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low amylase suggests chronic pancreatic damage.
remarks.high: Elevated amylase indicates pancreatic irritation.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Amylase is extremely high. High risk of acute pancreatitis. Seek immediate care.

description.en: Pituitary hormone that manages thyroid activity.
description.od: ହରମୋନ୍ ଯାହା ଥାଇରଏଡ୍ ଗ୍ରନ୍ଥିକୁ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ କରେ।

remarks.low: Low TSH indicates an overactive thyroid (Hyperthyroidism).
remarks.high: High TSH indicates an underactive thyroid (Hypothyroidism).

description.en: Helps the body absorb calcium for bone health and immune function.
description.od: ଶରୀରକୁ କ୍ୟାଲସିୟମ ଶୋଷଣ କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।

remarks.low: Vitamin D deficiency. High risk of bone loss and chronic fatigue. Supplements advised.
remarks.normal: Vitamin D level is healthy and optimal.
remarks.high: Vitamin D toxicity. High level can cause calcium buildup.

description.en: Essential vitamin for DNA synthesis and nerve cell protection.
description.od: ରକ୍ତ କଣିକା ଏବଂ ସ୍ନାୟୁ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ଗୁرୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ।

remarks.low: B12 deficiency. Risk of nerve tingling, fatigue, and macrocytic anemia.
remarks.high: Elevated B12 level, usually due to supplements.

description.en: Protein produced by liver indicating active infection or inflammation.
description.od: ଶରୀରରେ ସଂକ୍ରମଣ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରଦାହର ମାତ୍ରା ସୂଚିତ କରେ।

remarks.low: Normal. No active inflammation.
remarks.high: Elevated CRP. Indicates active bacterial infection, acute injury, or inflammatory condition.

description.en: Red blood cell enzyme protecting cells from oxidative stress and damage.
description.od: ଏଞ୍ଜାଇମ ଯାହା ଲୋହିତ ରକ୍ତ କଣିକାକୁ ନଷ୍ଟ ହେବାରୁ ରକ୍ତ କଣିକାକୁ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଦିଏ।

remarks.low: Deficient. Red cells are prone to breakage. Check warning list for drugs/foods.
remarks.normal: G6PD enzyme level is normal and protective.
remarks.high: G6PD level is normal/high.

description.en: Screens for Dengue virus antigen (NS1) or antibodies (IgM/IgG).
description.od: ଡେଙ୍ଗୁ ଜ୍ୱର ସଂକ୍ରମଣ ଚିହ୍ନଟ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ।

remarks.low: Negative. No active Dengue infection.
remarks.high: Positive. Active or recent Dengue virus infection detected.
remarks.critical: CRITICAL: Positive Dengue infection with warning signs. Hospital care may be needed.
